# TVDB

TV metadata from [TheTVDB](https://thetvdb.com) v4, used alongside [TMDB](tmdb.md)
for shows where TheTVDB has better episode data. Falls back to TVMaze when TheTVDB
has no match.

The plugin exchanges the API key for a bearer token on first use and caches it for
25 days, so a key that is revoked upstream can keep working until the cached token
expires.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.index.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TVDB__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TVDB__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
